name: Frozen Lemon Dessert
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the crushed graham crackers and sugar.
2. Blend in the softened butter.
3. Press about two-thirds of the crumb mixture into the bottom of a metal refrigerator tray.
4. Reserve the remaining crumbs for topping the dessert.
5. Chill the crust.
6. Beat the egg yolks, egg, and sugar together until very thick.
7. Stir in the lemon juice and salt.
8. Cook over simmering water, stirring constantly until the mixture thickens.
9. Turn the mixture into a bowl and cool it.
10. Beat the heavy cream until it forms soft peaks.
11. Fold in the grated lemon rind and vanilla into the egg mixture.
12. Pour into the refrigerator tray over the crumb crust and sprinkle with reserved crumbs.
13. Freeze until firm.
14. Cut into wedges.
